extraction.one_line_summary: BODZANA Filippo won from breakaway sprint in Veneto while ROGLITCH Primoz attacked final climb to take 11 seconds and jump ALMEIDA into second overall
tactical_patterns: INEOS allowed 6-minute breakaway gap before valley roads then burned matches early on penultimate climb, isolating THOMAS prematurely
ROGLITCH hung conspicuously at pack rear before final climbs then attacked alone, suggesting deliberate energy conservation tactic
VINE Jay descent mistake cost ALMEIDA critical seconds in GC defense, revealing vulnerability when isolated from strong descenders
Israel Premier Tech animated race with BODZANA and GEE but couldn't convert numerical advantage into stage win

rider_signals.ROGLITCH Primoz: positive: back-of-pack positioning before attacking suggests he can mask form until decisive moment, unlike obvious sufferers
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: isolated from all teammates yet conceded zero meters on final climb, defensive strength undervalued at 39 seconds back
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: lost 11 seconds and second place despite having VINE support, suggests inability to follow explosive attacks
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: moved up GC despite losing time, indicating others lost more, climbs well without team support
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: second consecutive breakaway sprint loss from similar position reveals pattern of final 200m weakness
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: went out the back immediately when attacked, blue jersey defense completely passive
